question: Create a private GitHub repository named iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam with a README initialized.
hint: Use the GitHub CLI: gh repo create <name> --private --confirm --add-readme
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
OWNER=$(gh api user --jq .login)
REPO="iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam"
# Check repo exists and is private
RESPONSE=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO --json private 2>/dev/null || echo '{"private":false}')
PRIVATE=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r .private)
if [[ "$PRIVATE" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Repo not private or does not exist"
  exit 1
fi
# Check README.md exists in default branch
CONTENT=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO/contents/README.md 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
if [[ "$CONTENT" == "{}" ]]; then
  echo "README.md not found"
  exit 1
fi
 exit 0

question: Add the user p127280 as a collaborator with push permission to the repository iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam.
hint: Use: gh repo add-collaborator <owner>/<repo> p127280 --permission push
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
OWNER=$(gh api user --jq .login)
REPO="iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam"
# Check if collaborator exists and permission is push
PERM=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO/collaborators/p127280 --jq .permission 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
if [[ "$PERM" == "push" ]]; then
  exit 0
else
  echo "Collaborator p127280 not found or permission is $PERM"
  exit 1
fi

question: Verify that the repository iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam is private, contains a README, and has p127280 as a collaborator with push permission.
hint: Combine checks from previous steps; you may run multiple gh api calls.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
OWNER=$(gh api user --jq .login)
REPO="iac-ansible-2526-voornaam-achternaam"
# 1. Private check
RESPONSE=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO --json private 2>/dev/null || echo '{"private":false}')
PRIVATE=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r .private)
if [[ "$PRIVATE" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Repo not private"
  exit 1
fi
# 2. README exists
CONTENT=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO/contents/README.md 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
if [[ "$CONTENT" == "{}" ]]; then
  echo "README missing"
  exit 1
fi
# 3. Collaborator permission
PERM=$(gh api repos/$OWNER/$REPO/collaborators/p127280 --jq .permission 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
if [[ "$PERM" != "push" ]]; then
  echo "Collaborator p127280 not push permission (got $PERM)"
  exit 1
fi
 echo "All checks passed"
 exit 0
